# smart-punctuation-allowlist: files permitted to still contain em-dash (U+2014) / en-dash (U+2013).
# Enforced by scripts/check-no-smart-punctuation.ps1. The AGENTS.md 3.14 ban is enforced repo-wide;
# this allowlist is normally EMPTY. Add a path ONLY as a justified temporary exception (e.g. a vendored
# file); the gate FAILS if a listed file is already CLEAN, so de-list a file in the same change that purges it.
# One repo-relative path per line (forward slashes).
